blog_title: Same GSM Different Price — Why ₹80 vs ₹140 Plain T-Shirts Have a ₹60 Gap (Carded vs Combed Yarn)
caption:
Same GSM, ₹60 price gap — and your customers think it's a scam 😬

We weighed both. Same weight. Same GSM. But one pilled after 5 washes, the other didn't. The difference? Yarn.

₹80 carded yarn = rough fibers, uneven prints, pilling. ₹140 combed ring-spun = smooth long fibers, crisp prints, durability.

Feel both before you order your next 500 pieces.

Save this if you're sourcing blanks for printing 👇
